summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NBA Edge betting predictions app. Backend APIs working excellently (91.7% success rate), frontend login flow and dashboard navigation working perfectly. Upcoming page successfully displays 9 NBA events with odds lines from multiple bookmakers.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 'No trained model available' - expected behavior
minor_issues.impact: Cannot generate picks until model is trained
minor_issues.note: This is expected behavior, not a bug

passed_tests: Backend health check and root endpoint
User authentication (login, register, get current user)
User endpoints (get upcoming events, get picks)
Frontend login flow with test credentials
Upcoming page displaying 9 NBA events with odds lines
Navigation between dashboard and upcoming pages
Odds data integration from The Odds API
